title: 无标题文章
summary: when generating code is cheap, the spec starts to feel more valuable. i keep thinking about my own tools: usbi went from shell → Go → Rust → .kts. Podsync went from Python → Rust. implementation changed rapidly but spec stayed the same feels like the shape of a lot more software... Agents are the new compilers. Specs are the new code. https:// kau.sh/blog/a…
